commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an `isCommandResponse` reply marker, tags normalized slash-command replies, mirrors the field in runtime-plan types, and skips Auto-TTS for marked payloads with a focused test update.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: handled slash command replies are ordinary text `ReplyPayload`s with no command marker, and final dispatch invokes TTS whenever the effective auto mode is not `off`. I did not run a live TTS provider/channel reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor follow-up is required because the supplied proof is tests/type/lint only and explicitly lacks a live TTS provider/channel run; ClawSweeper cannot supply the external contributor's runtime proof.

target.title: fix(tts): skip TTS synthesis for slash command responses (#82582)
